description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ruby:2.3 Docker image with a global before_script that runs "bundle install" and a variable JEKYLL_ENV set to production. Define two stages: test and deploy. Add a test job that runs in the test stage, executes "bundle exec jekyll build -d test", saves the "test" directory as an artifact, and runs on all branches except master. Add a pages job that runs in the deploy stage, executes "bundle exec jekyll build -d public", saves the "public" directory as an artifact, and only runs on the master branch to publish GitLab Pages.
